rationale: Issue split from DRIVERS-3394; clarifying phase description in spec test, not fixing driver behavior.
Retryable-writes spec requires raising previous error for driver exceptions; Go driver incorrectly updates prevIndefiniteErr for timeouts.
Issue split from DRIVERS-3411; per-driver child of cross-driver coordination ticket for spec test rollout.
Moving BSON types to top-level namespace; PHP/HHVM API/namespace design decision, not a spec rule violation.
Thin description; UTCDateTime constructor not accepting string; PHP API bug, insufficient detail for spec classification.
Segfault during iteration in HHVM; internal crash/implementation bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
SDAM spec requires using electionId to detect stale primaries; driver not implementing this requirement.
Adding getWriteConcern/getReadPreference methods to Manager for PHPLIB; API addition, not a spec conformance fix.
Bitwise operator typo (!= ~) in internal C code; implementation bug with no spec rule involved.
Making CursorID/Cursor constructors private; PHP API design decision, no spec rule contradicted.
Update option named incorrectly; spec requires 'multi', driver used wrong option name for multi-document updates.
Changing BSON conversion warnings to exceptions; internal error-handling improvement, no spec-defined behavior contradicted.
API improvement to allow optional WriteConcern on executeBulkWrite(); API design addition, not a spec rule violation.
BSON encoding should ignore protected/private properties per spec; driver was encoding them incorrectly.
Changing getWriteConcern/getReadPreference to return value objects instead of arrays; API improvement, no spec rule violated.
BSON Type objects should not serialize as root element; thin description but likely enforces BSON spec constraint.
Implementing getters for ReadPreference/WriteConcern properties; API usability improvement, no spec deviation.
Adding input validation for WriteConcern w and wtimeout ranges; input validation improvement, spec doesn't define these exceptions.
Build/test infrastructure failure; make test broken due to missing HHVM function, no spec involvement.
Default DSN 'localhost' is not parsable; spec-compliant URI requires 'mongodb://localhost' scheme prefix.
API redesign to support options array on BulkWrite/executeInsert; API addition for bypassDocumentValidation, not a spec nonconformance.
WriteResult must include effective WriteConcern; driver not setting applied WriteConcern, causing isAcknowledged() test failures.
Adding bypassDocumentValidation support for insert/update; new feature implementation via DRIVERS-250, not fixing incorrect existing behavior.
Linker fix to include OpenSSL/SASL; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior involved.
Dependency upgrade of bundled libbson/libmongoc; dependency bump, no spec behavior change.
Compatibility fix for HHVM 3.12; platform compatibility, no spec involvement.
HHVM 3.11 new data types support; platform compatibility update, no spec rule contradicted.
Insufficient detail; 'The Ghost bug' with no description; cannot classify.
Thin description; driver not picking up default writeConcern; insufficient detail to determine if specific spec rule violated.
Debug handler output consistency fix; cosmetic debug output improvement, no spec-defined behavior contradicted.
readconcernlevel not properly parsed from options array (only from URI string); driver not applying read concern per spec when passed as option.
Release tarball missing source code; packaging/release issue, no spec behavior involved.
BulkWrite update incorrectly choosing between replace and update; CRUD spec defines distinct replace vs update semantics.
Exception class selection inconsistency in selectServer(); internal API consistency improvement, no specific spec exception-type rule.
NULL check missing before setting readConcern on C driver; implementation/crash bug, not a spec rule violation.
HHVM autoloading not triggered for user-defined classes; HHVM platform bug, no MongoDB spec involvement.
WriteResult must include effective WriteConcern; driver not setting it from default/inherited, breaking isAcknowledged() spec behavior.
BSON spec defines binary subtype as one byte; driver silently truncates out-of-range values instead of throwing exception.
Adding wtimeout > INT32_MAX validation; input range validation improvement, spec doesn't define this exception requirement.
BSON spec defines Timestamp components as 32-bit integers; driver silently truncates 64-bit values instead of throwing exception.
Improving error message content in WriteExceptions; UX/messaging improvement, no spec-defined exception message format violated.
toJSON() returns empty string for corrupt BSON instead of throwing; error handling improvement, spec doesn't define behavior for corrupt input.
ObjectID should accept both upper and lower case hex; BSON spec doesn't restrict to lowercase, driver incorrectly rejects uppercase.
Corrupt BSON iteration leaves PHP value unpopulated silently; spec requires exception; driver echoes to stdout instead.
Build failure due to 'Logger' symbol conflict with HHVM 3.9-3.11; build/packaging issue, no spec behavior.
Rephrasing unsupported/corrupt BSON error messages; messaging improvement coordinated via DRIVERS-281, not a spec rule violation.
Memory management fix using mongoc_server_descriptions_destroy_all(); resource leak fix, no spec rule contradicted.
Connection sharing between requests improvement; performance/architecture improvement, no specific SDAM spec rule violated.
Adding bypassDocumentValidation to BulkWrite debug output; debug output improvement, no spec behavior contradicted.
Refactoring Cursor debug handler to avoid private mongoc API; internal implementation improvement, no spec rule contradicted.
